00030 #ifndef _LAMEBUS_LHD_H_
00031 #define _LAMEBUS_LHD_H_
00032 
00033 #include <device.h>
00034 
00035 /*
00036  * Our sector size
00037  */
00038 #define LHD_SECTSIZE  512
00039 
00040 /*
00041  * Hardware device data associated with lhd (LAMEbus hard disk)
00042  */
00043 struct lhd_softc {
00044         /* Initialized by lower-level attach code */
00045         void *lh_busdata;               /* The bus we're on */ 
00046         uint32_t lh_buspos;             /* Our slot on that bus */
00047         int lh_unit;                    /* What number lhd we are */
00048 
00049         /*
00050          * Initialized by config_lhd 
00051          */
00052 
00053         void *lh_buf;                   /* Pointer to on-card I/O buffer */
00054         int lh_result;                  /* Result from I/O operation */
00055         struct semaphore *lh_clear;     /* Synchronization */
00056         struct semaphore *lh_done;
00057 
00058         struct device lh_dev;           /* VFS device structure */
00059 };
00060 
00061 /* Functions called by lower-level drivers */
00062 void lhd_irq(/*struct lhd_softc*/ void *);      /* Interrupt handler */
00063 
00064 #endif /* _LAMEBUS_LHD_H_ */
